name: development
description: Developer workflow tools — session handoffs, context management, and repo migration utilities.

interface.longDescription: Session handoff and repository migration workflows for modern agent standards.
defaultPrompt: Create a detailed handoff for this coding session.
Summarize repo state and next steps for the next agent.
Migrate this repo from Claude-specific config to AGENTS/skills standards.
Create a branch, commit smartly scoped changes, push, and open a PR (ask whether draft).
